sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
I can see the change now:
- Magenta square moved from [[36, 17], [36, 18], [37, 18], [37, 17]] to [[35, 16], [35, 17], [36, 17], [36, 16]]
- Bottom bar W changed from 50px to 48px (shrunk by 2)
So clicking a magenta square moves it up-left by 1 pixel (diagonally up-left). The bottom bar also shrunk.
Let me check: the square was at rows 36-37, cols 17-18. After clicking, it's at rows 35-36, cols 16-17. So it moved up by 1 and left by 1.
The pattern seems to be: clicking a magenta square moves it diagonally up-left. I should continue clicking all magenta squares to move them toward the blue blob or toward the top bar.
Let me click all 4 magenta squares to see what happens. The current positions are:
1. [[35, 16], [35, 17], [36, 17], [36, 16]] - top-left
2. [[36, 40], [36, 41], [37, 41], [37, 40]] - top-right
3. [[55, 46], [55, 47], [56, 47], [56, 46]] - bottom-right
4. [[56, 15], [56, 16], [57, 16], [57, 15]] - bottom-left
Let me click them all to move them up-left.

<function=python>

# After: [[35, 16], [35, 17], [36, 17], [36, 16]]
# Bottom bar also shrunk from 50px to 48px.
# Plan: Click all magenta squares to move them toward the blue blob.

# 3. [[55, 46], [55, 47], [56, 47], [56, 46]]
# 4. [[56, 15], [56, 16], [57, 16], [57, 15]]

# Click all 4 squares to move them up-left
action([
    {'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 35, 'col': 16},
    {'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 36, 'col': 40},

])
